title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Amity University Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Amity University Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Amity University Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Amity University Advisory Limited:
Amity University Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amity University Advisory Limited!
